top_signals.title: Nearly 500,000 Russian soldiers killed in Ukraine, top UK intel chief says
top_signals.summary: The figure hardens a growing consensus among Western officials: Russia is on its heels for the first time since the Kremlin launched its invasion in 2022.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
top_signals.summary: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How a Regional Gulf Coast Port Became America's Crude Oil Export Capital
top_signals.summary: Three decades ago, I had just graduated from Texas A&M University and taken my first job as a chemical engineer in Corpus Christi, Texas. At the time, few people would have expected that this Gulf Coast city would one day sit at the center of the global energy system. Corpus was an important regional hub—refineries, chemical plants, steady industrial activity—but it wasn't viewed as a strategic asset on the world stage. Today, it is exactly that. The Port of Corpus Christi has become the largest crude oil export hub in the United…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
